title: Decision No. 31 of 2022 Amending the Executive Regulations of the Excise Tax Law
summary: Amends Bahrain excise-tax executive regulations and is relevant to digital tax administration because the opened official reference identifies an electronic system approved by the National Bureau for Revenue.

theme_notes.digital_economy.einvoicing_digital_tax: Introduces or amends electronic system requirements for excise-tax administration.

notes: Related instruments: Amends Executive Regulations of the Excise Tax Law
